title: Johnny's QOL
description: A quality of life modpack bringing you a streamlined Minecraft experience. Included in this are almost 100 addons to give your vanilla gameplay a much needed revamp without performance cost. Want even more? Check out Johnny’s QOL+!
body:
##               Minecraft the way it was meant to be played in 2024



- **Enjoy Minecraft's 1.21 update with a complete visual / quality of life makeover. This modpack is a hand picked selection of mods and features that I used to transform my vanilla gameplay journey. All these pieces come together to produce a fresh and immersive 2024 Minecraft experience!**

#   

### Features




- **UI Overhaul/additions fully customizable at your fingertips.**
  
- **Iris shaders support with included pack.**

- **Audio environment overhaul.**
  
- **Complete music control & music streaming integration.**
  
- **A plethora of QOL features for a streamlined minecraft experience.**
  
- **Built on Fabric with lightweight and optimized mods.**
  
- **All clientside features.**


#   

### PLEASE READ! -

- **_This modpack has now been split into TWO seperate modpacks. This version is focused on perfomance with some useful addons, while Johnny's QOL+ will include over 50 addtional mods_.**

- Firstly thank you to all of the mod,resource,and shaderpack developers that made it possilble  to compile this list to together. All included are permitted for open use. 

- This modpack was created with personal tweaking in mind. Almost everything that has been added to this pack can be adjusted to your liking. The default settings are meant to be a decent starting point for all the new in game features included. As you use this pack more you'll be able to fine tune all these new aspects for the perfect personal experience.

- You will need to link your Crafity to your music streaming service of choice before it will auto sync. 

- FAQ will be added if enough interest.

- This is my very first time creating a modpack! There are of course going to be some bugs and issues but this is new experience for me and I am learning a lot as I go! Thank you for understanding and I hope you enjoy!
